content:
The Edmonton Squash Club always has a variety of shoes, rackets, eye guards, grips, balls available, as well as racquet stringing services. You can generally expect the following items to be in stock.

All prices are exclusive of GST, and all club members receive a 10% discount on racquets and shoes.

Shoes

Salming Falco Women’s 2018 – $120.00Salming Kobra 2018 – $199.00

Eyeguards

BK Junior Stiletto Eye Guard – $36.00BK Stiletto Eye Guard – $36.00

Grips

Harrow Over Grip – $3.81Karakal Super Grip – $7.00

Squash Balls

Dunlop Elite Red Dot Doubles – $6.00Dunlop Intro Blue Dot – $5.00Dunlop Pro Double Yellow Dot – $5.00

Squash Racquets

BK Instinct – $150.00BK Ion Cannon PS – $179.99Harrow Vibe – $189.99Karakal S-100 FF – $165.00Karakal T-120 FF – $155.00

Racquet Restringing

Club Provided String – $40.00Bring Your Own String – $25.00
